title: antennaria neglecta var. gaspensis
intro: Antennaria neglecta var. gaspensis, also known as Arctic Yarrow or Gaspé Yarrow, is a rare and unique variety of the Antennaria plant, a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to North America. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Antennaria neglecta var. gaspensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and act as an antiseptic, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Antennaria neglecta var. gaspensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or salve, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of health issues.
